---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Why is the current behaviour not
enough?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen. If it maps to an existing feature in
Chromium, ungoogled-chromium, Brave, or Cromite, say so — prior art helps.

## Privacy impact

T3dmium's bar: the only network traffic is user-initiated, and
privacy-relevant defaults are conservative.

- Would this feature generate any network traffic? If so, when, to where,
  and is it user-initiated?
- Should it be on or off by default, and why?

Features that cannot meet the privacy bar will not be accepted, so it is
worth thinking this through up front.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about, including "do nothing" or solving
it with an extension.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, links, related issues.
